nodes.label: F9 SCFF:GD trade curve — MNIST (input-layer saving only)
nodes.rationale: Held-out accuracy falls monotonically 0.943->0.837 (n=3) as SCFF fraction rises 0->1, matching README's '25% SCFF -> -3.7pt' claim. Relative GD backward cost drops sharply at 25% SCFF (to ~0.35) then stays flat through 75% before dropping to ~0.12 at 100% — the input-layer-dominated cost-saving pattern is even sharper here than on digits. Embedded verbatim in phase1-report.md.
